feedback.text: I find it utterly apprehensible that a payment processor like MasterCard is able to completely take away the means of people making money by strongarming a digital platform into censoring content. It should never be possible for a company like MasterCard to enforce it's views on other companies or individuals. And now MasterCard is demanding censorship of live viewers about it's practices during an eSport event! Despicable, and it should not ever be allowed!
